sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52317" key="kakopro/swpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-πρόσωπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52317.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ugly-faced</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0500.tlg001:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1058a</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ κακοπρόσωπον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.40.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
